item.title: Version 1.0.15
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.15 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * [codex] Fix menu bar autohide state detection by @Chen-DaYi in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/105 * Fix official Homebrew cask bump workflow by @char1eslu in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/104 * Fix: 插件信任校验在宿主 team 不可读时改为 fail-closed by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/100 * Perf: 启动项扫描用一次 launchctl list 替代逐项 print（#21 需求1） by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/121 * Feat: 支持互换菜单栏图标的左右键点击行为（#98） by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/118 * Feat: 启动项支持本地备注（#21 需求3） by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/119
## New Contributors * @Goldenmonstew made their first contribution in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/100
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.14...v1.0.15
